extensionDescription.message: Record only the time you tap after taking a dose. Names, dose amounts, and effects are not stored.

purposeText.message: Saves only the time you tap the button in Chrome storage on this device. Names, dose amounts, and effects are not stored.

tapButtonDescription.message: Save the current time as one record.

onboardingGuideCopy.message: After taking a dose, tap "$BUTTON$" once to save the time.

emptyLatestRecord.message: No records yet. Tap "$BUTTON$" above to show your latest saved time here.

emptyHistoryRecords.message: No history yet. Create your first record with "$BUTTON$" above; your $COUNT$ most recent records will appear here.

clearButtonDescription.message: Deletes all records saved on this device.

confirmClear.message: Delete all records saved on this device?

firstRunGuide.message: First time: tap "$BUTTON$" right after taking a dose.

privacyNote.message: No data is sent outside this extension. Records are stored only in Chrome storage on this device.

premiumCopy.message: Premium is a one-time purchase ($PRICE$) and includes a $DAYS$ trial. Recording still works when Premium is inactive.

storageError.message: Could not read or write saved records.
